name: get_zone_day_report
description: Retrieves a daily report for a specific heating zone on a given date. Returns detailed climate data and heating activity information for that day, including temperature history, heating runtime, energy consumption, and other performance metrics. Used to view historical heating performance and activity logs for analysis and optimization.

date.description: The date for which to retrieve the day report, in YYYY-MM-DD format

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone
